description: After you successfully execute a command, a DBot message appears in the War Room with the command details.
examples:
Command Example
#
!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="3 days ago" limit=50
!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="2025-09-15 17:10:00" date_to="2025-09-15 17:11:00" limit=100
!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="1 hour ago" limit=10 should_push_events=false
Additional Resources
#
For more information about CyberArk Identity Security Platform integration, refer to the official CyberArk documentation:

!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="3 days ago" limit=50
!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="2025-09-15 17:10:00" date_to="2025-09-15 17:11:00" limit=100
!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="1 hour ago" limit=10 should_push_events=false
Additional Resources
#
For more information about CyberArk Identity Security Platform integration, refer to the official CyberArk documentation:
Integrate Audit with third-party SIEM applications
SIEM Integration API

!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="2025-09-15 17:10:00" date_to="2025-09-15 17:11:00" limit=100
!cyberark-isp-get-events date_from="1 hour ago" limit=10 should_push_events=false
Additional Resources
#
For more information about CyberArk Identity Security Platform integration, refer to the official CyberArk documentation:

outputs.description: Unique identifier of the audit event. CyberArkISP.Event.tenantId Tenant identifier.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.uuid

outputs.description: Event timestamp (Unix milliseconds). CyberArkISP.Event.username Username associated with the event.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.timestamp

outputs.description: Application code (e.g., IDP). CyberArkISP.Event.auditCode Audit code identifier.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.applicationCode

outputs.description: Type of audit event (e.g., Info, Warning, Error). CyberArkISP.Event.action Action performed.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.auditType

outputs.description: User ID associated with the event. CyberArkISP.Event.source Source IP address.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.userId

outputs.description: Type of action (e.g., Start, End). CyberArkISP.Event.component Component name.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.actionType

outputs.description: Custom event data. CyberArkISP.Event.cloudProvider Cloud provider (e.g., aws).
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.customData

outputs.description: Identity type (e.g., NON_HUMAN, HUMAN). CyberArkISP.Event.originRegion Origin region.
outputs.name: CyberArkISP.Event.identityType
